parents.subject: LU-20087 nodemap: fix wrong offset_start for GID mapping

commit.subject: LU-16499 lfs: deprecate lfs_migrate script
commit.message:
LU-16499 lfs: deprecate lfs_migrate script

Deprecate the lfs_migrate script in favor of the lfs migrate
command.

- stop installing lfs_migrate for client version >= 2.20.53
- add a runtime deprecation warning to lfs_migrate
- update tests to use lfs migrate where applicable
- run test_56wd and test_56xb only when lfs_migrate is supported

Change-Id: I6f81ada1e53e9799fed0af1950d540183eec80f1
Signed-off-by: Chakshu Kansal <ckansal@ddn.com>
